assignments.name: firstDayLastMonth
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(1); d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - 1); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; })() }}

assignments.name: lastDayLastMonth
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(0); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; })() }}

assignments.name: monthName
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - 1); return d.toLocaleString('en-US', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }); })() }}
